snippet.title: Madhavi का Business चल रहा ज़ोर शोर से | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Madhuri Ka Aam Ka Business
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Comedy: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBIT1FSJW6yTlzqK-31FDWg?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the comedy clips of Gokuldhaam Summer Special:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLSXTaG1fT0cQEJPJkWQcRi1-6V6CFSSh3

Madhavi all set on starting her own small business. But this time she is planning on experimenting with her business ideas. Will her business be a success? Let's find out!

About The Show:
----------------------------
Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah is a comedy show inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chashmah' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This show revolves around Gada Family which consists of uneducated Businessman Jethalal Champaklal Gada, Jethalal’s Wife Daya & their naughty Son Tipendra Gada living in 'Gokuldham Co-operative Society' and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. In case of a problem and emergency, Jethalal Gada often rushes to Taarak Mehta to seek his help and guidance as he finds a philosopher in him. The residents of the housing society, help each other find solutions when they face common, real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

#tmkoc #taarakmehta

snippet.description:

snippet.title: ആനുകൂല്യങ്ങൾ വരുന്നു!ലോക്ക്‌ഡൗൺ തുടരുമോ തീരുമാനം ഇങ്ങനെ.പെൻഷൻ.കിറ്റ്.Kerala news Update.Pension.kit
snippet.description:
Video deals with Central and state government up-to-date announcements.
Indian Government, at all levels, announces Welfare Schemes for a cross section of the society from time to time. These schemes could be either Central, State specific or a joint collaboration between the Centre and the States. In this section, we have attempted to provide you an easy and single point access to information about several welfare schemes of the Government and their various aspects including eligible beneficiaries, types of benefits, scheme details etc.

⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

⚠️ ഈ ചാനലിലൂടെ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന വീഡിയോകളിൽ ഒരുതരത്തിലുമുള്ള രാഷ്ട്രീയം/ മതം എന്നിവയുടെ അതിപ്രസരം ഇല്ല. ഗവൺമെന്റ് പോളിസികൾക്ക് എപ്പോൾ വേണമെങ്കിലും മാറ്റം ഉണ്ടാവാം. അതിനാൽ പുതിയ വീഡിയോ അപ്‌ഡേഷൻ കാണാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക.

LYRICS:

(ASAP) verse

I say wooo ! 
Hawa aney do ! 
raate hui rangeen 
Hauley jhume meri soul 

I say wooo ! 
Huwe pone 2
Mausam badla tab jub 
Suraj dhalke taare kare glow 

I know 
Baby tujhe chahiye mera saath 
Aur gedi lagey wo bhi slow slow 

No no no ! 
Lowkey rehne do 
Nazre chrao na 
Ankho ko kehne do 
 
Kehne ko
bhot kuch
Lagun tich 
Bande sick 
Mare Hit
Baby photo bhi khichwari jaari 
saath Click click 

Mare shows 
chhape note 
Number one 
On the board 

koi ghamand nahi pala 
Bhale kaam top-notch
Yaari rakhi on the top 
Party baje nonstop 
Champagne pop it up

Haseen hui chali raatein 
toh phir unme kesa khouf 
Hum lutein puri mouj 
BeyAsar thi kharonch 
Yeh jungle hai cheete 
shikaar kaa bhi shauq

CHANTS / HOOK

(JAZ) verse

Verse

Karo bounce bounce bounce mere sath mein 
Mai jeetu dil jab kalam pakdu hath mai 
Ajj dark skin munda kare glow 
Hai seena chawda zindagi mai jiyu shaan se 

Na na na na 

Kbhi nazare jhukau na bas yehi hai usool !
Hai unko bhi pyar jo gaye mujhe bhool
Bund marate ye piche aage bante hai cool
Lokki karde a galla appa karde a rule....

Om my god ! 

Bade checks badi soch 
Munde roz lere mauj 
Pura josh nahi hosh 
High class mere flows 
Jinne bhi thay tezz mere aage aaj sare hue slow slow slow
 
Ohh no ! 

Jaha per dhare shor bande aam nahi 
Ek ke baad ek hit halka kaam nahi nahi 
Mai feel mai hu karo pareshan nahi 
Hit hu mai pehle se bas abhi mera naan nahi !

CHANTS / HOOK

(KING) verse

Karaan main fly high par pair rakhan thalle,
Duniya di feel len Raja baitha kalle,
Jo waqt palte jaani sher ka vo bachha,
Na to muh to hai mufat kuch to bolenge hi dalle.

Aafat macha di maine zamane se puch lo
Aur peeche koi hath mere esi koi baat nahi hai,

Akela nikla tha main ghar se ek sapna leke
Aaj koi aesa nahi jo khada mere sath nahi hai.

Kingsclan flow!
Shawty get low!

Industry khichhan mere latte kehndi edda na karo! No! No! No!
Raja jaane do...
Ye bachhe hain humare inhe gana gaane do.

Kar diya bounce
Lo bhar diya maine account
Lo aa rahi firse album ek aur kardo sabmein announce.

Jaise aasmaan - zameen ka mile chhod nahi
Vaise yaar ka tere bhi koi todh nahi.

CHANTS / HOOK

Now in its fourth season, Super Dancer is a popular children's dance reality show. snippet.title: 15 मिनट में मसाला डोसा बनाने की विधि - Instant Suji Se Masala Dosa Recipe CookingShooking
snippet.description:
Dosto, Suji se Instantly, 15 minute me Masala Dosa Banane ki Recipe le kar aaya hu, jarur bana ke try kariega..

CookingShooking ko jarur subscribe karein -  https://goo.gl/MH3A4r

Instagram me follow jarur karein - https://www.instagram.com/cooking.shooking

English videos - https://goo.gl/Sxk4Fp

Suji Masala Dosa - Ingredients:
6-7 Dosa ke lie
Suji - 1 cup
Besan - 1 tbsp
Gehu ka Atta - 1 tbsp
Namak - taste hisab se
Dahi - 1 cup
Pani - batter banane ke lie
Baking Soda - 1/4 tsp
Oil - Dosa sekne ke lie

Oil - 1 tbsp
Sarso - 1 tsp
Chana dal - 1 tbsp
Curry Leaves - 8-10
Hari Mirch - 1
Ginger - 1 inch
Pyaaz - 1 slices, large size ke
Salt - to taste
Haldi Powder - 1/2 tsp
Red Chilli Powder - 1/4 tsp
Aloo - 5 (boiled, peeled, chopped)
Hara Dhania - 2 tbsp

Kitchen Products
Measuring Cup & Spoon Set - https://amzn.to/2KZBVpq
Chopper for Fine Cutting - https://amzn.to/2UCCo7X
Mixer Grinder - https://amzn.to/2XTI1jW 
Power Blender for Smoothie, Shakes - https://amzn.to/37ozHM6
Hand Blender+Mixer+Chopper - https://amzn.to/2MOHjhL
Gas Sandwich Griller - https://amzn.to/37mvfgW
Good NonStick Pan - https://amzn.to/2zl0hsa (steel spoon safe)
Kitchen Weight Scale - https://amzn.to/2ug3G65 
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2N2wzuf (keep in freezer)
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2KZSkdn (small pack)
Pizza Screen - https://amzn.to/2m4zpn6 (3 pack - 6,7,8 inches)
Parchment Paper - much better than butter paper, and it is reusable - https://amzn.to/2MZFGvC
Whipping Cream - https://amzn.to/2ugPB8m
Oven For Baking - https://amzn.to/2udP3A5 (28liter Good for 3-4 people)

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3169 - Jethalal Takes Bapuji on a Trip! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani
Written By: Raju Odedra & Rajen Upadhyay
Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

snippet.title: VR LIVE വിശ്വാസിയുടെ ദിനരാത്രങ്ങള്‍ ഭാഗം-7 | CBMS ക്യാമ്പസ്‌ |Shajahan Rahmani
snippet.description:
#Voice_of_Rahmaniyya   #Malayalam_Islamic_Speech #islamicspeechmalayalamnew #islamicspeeches #islamicspeechmalayalam #islamicspeechinmalayalam #islamicspeechmalayalamnew2020 #islamicspeechlive  #islamicspeechtv #islamicspeech2020 #islamicspeechandquran #islamicspeechesinmalayalam #islamicspeechmalayalam2020 #islamicspeechmalayalam2019 #islamicspeech2019
കേരളീയ വൈജ്ഞാനിക പ്രയാണ ചരിത്രത്തിൽ സമന്വയ വിദ്യഭ്യാസമെന്ന നൂതനവും കാലികവുമായ ആശയത്തിന് ബീജാവാഹം പകർന്ന് കൊടുത്ത സ്ഥാപനമാണ് കടമേരി റഹ്മാനിയ്യ. പിൽകാലത്ത് കേരള മണ്ണിൽ ഉയിർ കൊണ്ട് വിജ്ഞാന കേന്ദ്രങ്ങളെല്ലാം ആ ആശയത്തിന് ഊടും പാവും നൽകി വെെവിധ്യങ്ങൾ നെയ്തെടുത്തതാണ്.ചീക്കിലോട്ട് കുഞ്ഞമ്മദ് മുസ്ലിയാരുടെ നിഷകളങ്ക പ്രയത്നത്തിൻ്റെ നിത്യസ്മാരകം കൂടിയാണ് റഹ്മാനിയ്യ എന്ന വെെജ്ഞാനിക കേദാരം. പതിറ്റാണ്ടുകൾ പിന്നിട്ട റഹ്മാനിയ്യ കെെരളിക്ക് അതുല്ല്യ നേട്ടങ്ങൾ സംഭവന ചെയ്തിട്ടുണ്ട്. പ്രത്യേകിച്ച് മത പ്രബോധന വീഥിയിൽ.എണ്ണമറ്റ റഹ്മാനികളായ പ്രഭാഷകന്മാർ അഹ്ലുസുന്നത്തി വൽജമാആത്തിൻ്റെ ആദർശഭടന്മാരായി നിലകൊള്ളുന്നു. അവരുടെ അർത്ഥഗർഭമായ പ്രഭാഷണങ്ങൾ സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയയിലൂടെ ലോകത്തിന് മുമ്പിൽ എത്തിക്കുകയെന്ന എളിയ ശ്രമമാണ് വോയിസ് ഓഫ് റഹ്മാനിയ്യ. പഠനാർഹമായ പുതിയ വിഷയങ്ങൾ ക്ലിപ്പുകളാക്കി ദെെനം ദിനം ജനങ്ങളിലെത്തിക്കാനും പ്രഭാഷണങ്ങൾ ലെെവ് ചെയ്ത് തൽസമയം പ്രേഷകരിലെത്തിക്കാനും ഇതിൻ്റെ അണിയറ പ്രവർത്തകർ ബദ്ധശ്രദ്ധരാണ്



https://chat.whatsapp.com/4ZCyiAXzKZ5...

ഇതിൽ ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്താൽ വോയ്സ് ഓഫ് റഹ്മാനിയ്യ ഗ്രൂപ്പിൽ മെമ്പർ ആവാം താൽപര്യമുള്ളവർ ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയത് അഡ്മിൻസുമായി നിയമാവലി കൈപറ്റുക

snippet.title: 15 മിനുറ്റിൽ 3 കറികളും കൂട്ടി ഒരു ഊണ് || Lockdown Menu || No Coconut || 3 Dishes in 15 minutes
snippet.description:
Hello dear friends, this is my 498th Vlog. In this video demonstrate How to make Easy Mutta Porichathum & Vanpayar Ularthu

How to make Easy Mutta Porichathum & Vanpayar Ularthu

Dry red  chillies - 6 nos
Small onion - 5 - 6 nos
Tamarind - 1 Lemon Size
Salt( according to taste )
Water
Coconut oil - 11/2  - 2 tbs
........................................................

Vanpayar Ularthu

Red cowpeas ( Perumpayar / vanpayar ) - 11/2 Cup
Turmeric powder - 1/2 tsp
Salt( according to taste )
Coconut oil - 11/2 tbs
Mustard Seeds - 1tsp
Dry red  chillies - 3 - 4 nos
Curry Leaves
Small onion - 8 nos   ( Crushed )
Garlic - 2 Big Flakes ( Crushed )
Big onion - 1 nos ( Half Sliced )
Crushed dry red chillies - 11/2 tbs
..........................................................


Mutta Porichathum

Coconut oil -  2 tbs
Curry Leaves
Eggs - 4 nos
Turmeric powder - 1/4 tsp
Coriander Powder - 11/2 tbs
Kashmiri chilli powder - 1 tbs
Salt( according to taste )
Vinegar - 1/2  -  1 tsp

Please share your valuable feedback's through the comment box.
Don't forget to Like, Share and Subscribe. Love you all :)

ml.description:
Hello dear friends, this is my 498th Vlog. In this video demonstrate How to make Easy Mutta Porichathum & Vanpayar Ularthu

How to make Easy Mutta Porichathum & Vanpayar Ularthu

Dry red  chillies - 6 nos
Small onion - 5 - 6 nos
Tamarind - 1 Lemon Size
Salt( according to taste )
Water
Coconut oil - 11/2  - 2 tbs
........................................................

Vanpayar Ularthu

Red cowpeas ( Perumpayar / vanpayar ) - 11/2 Cup
Turmeric powder - 1/2 tsp
Salt( according to taste )
Coconut oil - 11/2 tbs
Mustard Seeds - 1tsp
Dry red  chillies - 3 - 4 nos
Curry Leaves
Small onion - 8 nos   ( Crushed )
Garlic - 2 Big Flakes ( Crushed )
Big onion - 1 nos ( Half Sliced )
Crushed dry red chillies - 11/2 tbs
..........................................................


Mutta Porichathum

Coconut oil -  2 tbs
Curry Leaves
Eggs - 4 nos
Turmeric powder - 1/4 tsp
Coriander Powder - 11/2 tbs
Kashmiri chilli powder - 1 tbs
Salt( according to taste )
Vinegar - 1/2  -  1 tsp

snippet.description:

Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. snippet.title: മൗഗ്ലി ഒരു കില്ലാടി തന്നെ... നീന്താനും അറിയാം... മീനിന്റെ കുളത്തിൽ വീണ മൗഗ്ലി
snippet.description:
Hi guys,

This video features me and few of my lovely pets spending quality time in this pleasant climate. 

I’ve given 3 of my horses Majeed , Boney and Torque freedom to run around freely and have some fun.

Mougli unexpectedly fell into the fish pond, but nothing to worry he is safe.

I hope everything is going well and each of you are safe and healthy. 
Stay safe❤️

snippet.title: ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസും വൈറ്റ് ഫങ്കസും പിടിപെടാതിരിക്കാൻ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ട പ്രധാനകാര്യങ്ങൾ.അറിവ് ഷെയർചെയ്യുക
snippet.description:
ഇന്ന് കോവിഡിനെക്കാൾ ഭയപ്പെടുന്ന രോഗമാണ് ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസ്.
0:00 ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസ്
2:00 കോവിഡ് രോഗികള്‍ക്ക് വരുന്നത് എന്ത് കൊണ്ട്?
3:00 ആര്‍ക്കൊക്കെ വരാന്‍ സാധ്യതയുണ്ട്?
4:09 എങ്ങനെ ഒഴിവാക്കാം?
6:00 മാസ്ക്ക് വില്ലനാകുന്നുണ്ടോ?
8:00 എങ്ങനെ തിരിച്ചറിയാം?

 കോവിഡ് കഴിഞ്ഞവർക്ക് എന്തുകൊണ്ട് ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസ് രോഗം പിടിപെടുന്നു ? ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസ് രോഗം ഒഴിവാക്കാൻ നാം ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ട ചില പ്രധാന കാര്യങ്ങൾ എന്തെല്ലാം ? വിശദമായി അറിയുക. ഒരുപാടുപേർക്ക് ഉപകാരപ്പെടുന്ന ഇൻഫർമേഷൻ ആണിത് 

For Appointments  Please Call 90 6161 5959

snippet.title: FTX Crypto Cup Day 1 | ft. Carlsen, Nepo, Giri & top 10 in the world |Live commentary Sagar & Amruta
snippet.description:
Get Chessbase 16 + Mega Database 2021: https://chessbase.in/online-shop#!/ChessBase-16-Mega-Database-2021-Combo-Preorder-Release-date-17th-November-2020/p/253790402/category=0

The 6th event of the Meltwater Champions Chess Tour - FTX Crypto Cup. It is the highest prize money online chess event ever with a prize fund of US$3,20,000. All the top 10 players in the world will be taking part in this event.

The FTX Crypto Cup is held from the 23rd of May 2021. It goes on until 31st of May 2021. The players who are taking part in this tournament are Magnus Carlsen, Anish Giri, Ian Nepomniachtchi, Fabiano Caruana, MVL, Wesley So, Levon Aronian,  Shakhriyar Mamedyarov, Peter Svidler, Alireza Firouzja, Hikaru Nakamura, Teimour Radjabov, Ding Liren, Alexander Grischuk, Daniil Dubov and Alan Pichot. 

The 3-day preliminary stage sees the 16 players play each other once before the bottom 8 are eliminated while the top 8 advance to a knockout consisting of 2-day matches.

The time control is 15 minutes for all moves, with a 10-second increment per move from move 1. Live commentary by Sagar Shah, Amruta Mokal and guests!

Intro article: https://chessbase.in/news/Meltwater-Champions-Chess-Tour-FTX-Crypto-Cup-preview

Video:  ChessBase India

snippet.description:
मुंबईच्या उपनगरांनाही शेकडो वर्षांचा इतिहास आहे. किंबहुना हजार वर्षांपूर्वी ठाणे हे राजधानीचं शहर होतं आणि मुंबई हे उपनगर होतं. मध्य रेल्वेवरील अनेक स्थानकं या परीसराच्या शेकडो वर्षांच्या ऐतिहासिक अस्तित्वाची निशाणी आहेत. रेल्वेच्या स्थानकांना ही नावं कशी पडली हे सांगतायत खाकी टूर्सचे भरत गोठोसकर...
#गोष्टमुंबईची​ #GoshtMumbaichi #MumbaiRailway

snippet.title: F9 | Thank You World
snippet.description:
To our worldwide Fast family, it’s good to be back on the big screen! We thank you. 


F9 - Fast is back June 25.
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/TheFastSaga/ 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/thefastsaga/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/thefastsaga
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@thefastsaga

http://www.thefastsaga.com/

No matter how fast you are, no one outruns their past. 

F9 is the ninth chapter in the Fast & Furious Saga, which has endured for two decades and has earned more than $5 billion around the world.  

Vin Diesel’s Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he’s going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they’ve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom’s forsaken brother, Jakob (John Cena, the upcoming The Suicide Squad). 

F9 sees the return of Justin Lin as director, who helmed the third, fourth, fifth and sixth chapters of the series when it transformed into a global blockbuster. The action hurtles around the globe—from London to Tokyo, from Central America to Edinburgh, and from a secret bunker in Azerbaijan to the teeming streets of Tbilisi. Along the way, old friends will be resurrected, old foes will return, history will be rewritten, and the true meaning of family will be tested like never before.  

The film stars returning cast members Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris “Ludacris” Bridges, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel and Sung Kang, with Oscar® winner Helen Mirren and Oscar® winner Charlize Theron. F9 also features Grammy-winning superstar Cardi B as new franchise character Leysa, a woman with a connection to Dom’s past, and a cameo by Reggaeton sensation Ozuna.  

F9 is produced by Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend and Samantha Vincent.  www.thefastsaga.com

snippet.title: Real Chocolate Recipe in Tamil | Chocolate making Trick | Perfect Homemade Chocolate Recipe
snippet.description:
In this video we will see how to make chocolate at home in tamil. This recipe makes perfect silky smooth chocolate. With this magic ingredient, you will be making perfect homemade chocolates. We can make these chocolates from cocoa butter or ghee or coconut oil and all of them tastes absolutely smooth and silky.

#ChocolateRecipe #HomemadeChocolate #ChocolateInGrinder

From Cocoa butter:
200g Cocoa butter
50g Milk powder
60 g Cocoa powder
200g Sugar

From Coconut Oil:
200g Coconut Oil
50g Milk powder
60 g Cocoa powder
200g Sugar

From Ghee:
200g Ghee
50g Milk powder
60 g Cocoa powder
200g Sugar

Pic taken from: https://chocolatealchemy.com/conching-and-refining
tags: how to make chocolate at home
how to make chocolate in grinder

snippet.title: Sabse Acche Pati Sabse Sacche Pati! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | TMKOC Comedy | तारक मेहता
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku

snippet.description:
⭐👇 আপনিও কি জীবনে বড় স্বপ্ন দেখেন? ⭐👇 সেই স্বপ্নগুলোকে আপনি সত্যি করতে পারেন নতুন App, Josh Skills-এর সাহায্যে! DOWNLOAD APP NOW: https://joshskills.app.link/LmxW5q2yx8



এক গ্রামের মেয়ে যাকে মা- বাবা ছোটবেলায় ফেলে রেখে গিয়েছিল 'বোঝা' মনে করে, আজ @Soumali Adhikary  লক্ষ্য লক্ষ্য মানুষের কাছে অতি পরিচিত YouTube Star

কিন্তু কিভাবে একজন সাধারণ মেয়ে, একজন সাধারণ Housewife থেকে হয়ে উঠলেন একজন Successful YouTuber?
একের পর এক Failure আর Rejection তাঁকে সাহায্য করেছে সফল হওয়ার জেদটা বজায় রাখতে।
Soumali আজ প্রথমবার জানিয়েছেন YouTube-এ Successful হওয়ার জন্য তাঁর Tips, সঙ্গে  Social Media Influencer হিসেবে তাঁর Income-ই বা কত
দেখুন এই Motivational কাহিনী Josh Talks Bangla-এর মঞ্চে



যদি আপনার কাহিনীও লক্ষ্য লক্ষ্য মানুষকে অনুপ্রাণিত করতে পারে, তবে আমাদের সাথে যোগাযোগ করুন এই মেইল আইডিতেঃ
soumik@joshtalks.com

Born and brought up in a village and an abandoned girl child by parents, today Soumali Adhikary is a popular YouTuber

But how from an ordinary girl, a very ordinary housewife Soumali became a YouTube star? From converting her every rejection and failure to her pillar of success, Soumali today discloses her secret tips to become a successful YouTuber

Explore this motivational talk by @soumali on Josh Talks Bangla

If your story too can inspire millions of people, reach out to us via this email id:

soumik@joshtalks.com

Josh Talks passionately believes that a well-told story has the power to reshape attitudes, lives, and ultimately, the world. We are on a mission to find and showcase the best motivational stories from across India through documented videos, motivational speeches, and live events held all over the country. Josh Talks Bangla aims to inspire and motivate you by bringing to you the best Bangla motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches, struggle to success, zero to hero, and failure to success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, women’s rights, public policy, sports, entertainment, and social initiatives. With 8 languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the challenges they face in their careers or business and helping them discover their true calling in life.

কিন্তু কিভাবে একজন সাধারণ মেয়ে, একজন সাধারণ Housewife থেকে হয়ে উঠলেন একজন Successful YouTuber?
একের পর এক Failure আর Rejection তাঁকে সাহায্য করেছে সফল হওয়ার জেদটা বজায় রাখতে।
Soumali আজ প্রথমবার জানিয়েছেন YouTube-এ Successful হওয়ার জন্য তাঁর Tips, সঙ্গে  Social Media Influencer হিসেবে তাঁর Income-ই বা কত

soumik@joshtalks.com

Born and brought up in a village and an abandoned girl child by parents, today Soumali Adhikary is a popular YouTuber

But how from an ordinary girl, a very ordinary housewife Soumali became a YouTube star? From converting her every rejection and failure to her pillar of success, Soumali today discloses her secret tips to become a successful YouTuber

snippet.title: मोहिनी एकादशी व्रत कथा || Mohini Ekadashi Ki Katha || Ekadashi Vrat Katha || मोहिनी एकादशी की कहानी
snippet.description:
मोहिनी एकादशी की कथा,  मोहिनी एकादशी व्रत कथा, मोहिनी एकादशी की व्रत कथा, मोहिनी एकादशी व्रत की कथा, मोहिनी एकादशी की कहानी, एकादशी व्रत कथा, एकादशी की कहानी, एकादशी की कथा 
नमस्कार दोस्तों आज मैं आप सभी के समक्ष वैशाख शुक्ल पक्ष की मोहिनी एकादशी की कथा प्रस्तुत कर रही हूं। वैशाख मास की शुक्ल पक्ष की एकादशी के दिन भगवान श्री हरि विष्णु जी ने मोहिनी अवतार लिया था,  इसीलिए इस एकादशी का नाम मोहिनी एकादशी पड़ा। मोहिनी एकादशी की कथा सुनने मात्र से 1000 गोदान का फल प्राप्त होता है। मोहिनी भगवान विष्णु का एकमात्र स्त्री रूप अवतार है। इसमें उन्हें ऐसे स्त्री रूप में दिखाया गया है जो सभी को मोहित कर ले। मान्यता है कि मोहिनी एकादशी का व्रत करने से सभी पापों से मुक्ति मिलती है और मोक्ष की प्राप्ति होती है। मोहिनी एकादशी को काफी प्रभावशाली माना गया है और कहा जाता है कि इस व्रत को करने वाला व्यक्ति जीवन में सभी तरह के दुखों से दूर रहता है तथा उसे बैकुंठ धाम की प्राप्ति होती है।इस व्रत को भगवान राम और युधिष्ठिर ने भी रखा था | युधिष्ठिर को धर्म ज्ञान देते हुए श्रीकृष्ण कहने लगे कि हे धर्मराज ! मैं आपसे एक कथा कहता हूँ, जिसे महर्षि वशिष्ठ ने श्री रामचंद्रजी से कही थी। एक समय श्रीराम बोले कि हे गुरुदेव! कोई ऐसा व्रत बताइए, जिससे समस्त पाप और दु:ख का नाश हो जाए। मैंने सीताजी के वियोग में बहुत दु:ख भोगे हैं।
महर्षि वशिष्ठ बोले- हे राम! आपकी बुद्धि अत्यंत शुद्ध तथा पवित्र है। यद्यपि आपका नाम स्मरण करने से मनुष्य पवित्र और शुद्ध हो जाता है तो भी जन कल्याण के लिए  यह बड़ा ही उत्तम प्रश्न है। वैशाख मास में शुक्ल पक्ष की जो एकादशी आती है उसका नाम मोहिनी एकादशी है। मोहिनी एकादशी व्रत करने से मनुष्य सब पापों तथा दु:खों से छूटकर  मोह माया से मुक्त हो जाता है।संसार में इस व्रत से श्रेष्ठ कोई व्रत नहीं है। 
मोहिनी एकादशी तिथ‍ि की शुरुआत 22 मई द‍िन शन‍िवार को प्रात: 9 बजकर 15 मिनट से होगी। यह 23 मई को 06 बजकर 42 मिनट पर समाप्‍त होगी। वहीं जो जातक यह व्रत कर रहे हैं वह 24 मई सोमवार प्रात: 06 बजकर 01 म‍िनट से सुबह 08 बजकर 39 म‍िनट के बीच पारण कर सकते हैं। एकादशी की तिथ‍ि के द‍िन नित्‍यकर्मों से न‍िवृत्‍त होकर पूजा करनी चाहिए। 
 मैं मोहिनी एकादशी व्रत कथा कहता हूँ, ध्यानपूर्वक सुनो।
Hello friends, today I am presenting to you all the story of Mohini Ekadashi of Vaishakh Shukla Paksha. On the day of Ekadashi of Shukla Paksha of Vaishakh month, Lord Shri Hari Vishnu ji took the incarnation of Mohini, hence the name of this Ekadashi was named Mohini Ekadashi. Just by listening to the story of Mohini Ekadashi one gets 1000 fruits. Mohini is the only female form incarnation of Lord Vishnu. In this, she is shown in a feminine form that captivates everyone. It is believed that by observing Mohini Ekadashi one gets freedom from all sins and attains salvation. Mohini Ekadashi is considered very influential and it is said that the person observing this fast keeps away from all kinds of sorrows in life and receives Baikuntha Dham. This fast was also kept by Lord Rama and Yudhishthira. Giving knowledge to Yudhishthira, Shri Krishna started saying, "O Dharmaraja!" I tell you a story, which Maharishi Vasistha told to Shri Ramchandraji. Once Shriram said, "O Gurudev!" Describe a vow that will destroy all sins and sorrows. I have suffered a lot in the disconnection of Sitaji.
Maharishi Vasistha said - O Ram! Your intellect is very pure and pure. Although a person becomes pure and pure by remembering your name, it is a very good question for public welfare. The name of Ekadashi of Shukla Paksha in Vaishakh month is Mohini Ekadashi. By observing Mohini Ekadashi, a person is freed from all sins and sorrows and is freed from attachment to Maya. There is no best fast in this world for this fast.
Mohini Ekadashi Tithi will start from 9:15 AM on Saturday, 22 May. It will end on May 23 at 06:42AM . On the other hand, those who are observing this fast can pass it between 06:00 AM to 08:00 AM and 08:00 AM on Monday, 24 May. Worship should be done on the day of Ekadashi with the regular rituals.
 I tell the story of Mohini Ekadashi fast, listen carefully.
#mohiniekadashi  #मोहिनीएकादशी #ekadashivratkatha #एकादशीव्रतकथा

#mohiniekadashi  #मोहिनीएकादशी #ekadashivratkatha #एकादशीव्रतकथा

snippet.title: Filmymoji || Spirit Game || Middle Class Madhu || శవంతో సరదాగా || MCM
snippet.description:
Filmymoji || Spirit Game || Middle Class Madhu || శవంతో సరదాగా || MCM

Filmymoji releases Savam tho Saradaaga based on Middle Class Madhu’s childhood memories with Spirit game alias ouija board. It’s filmymoji first attempt at horror comedy. Middle class Madhu and Mahesh encounters a scary situation with the stray dogs in their street. During that night Middle class Madhu gets a scary dream. Following that night, the very next morning they get to hear about the death of Remo, a 108 year old ace PUBG player whose spirit tells about the hidden treasure to Middle class Madhu. Watch the full episode, to witness the treasure hunt heroics of MCM in this entertaining horror comedy flick.

snippet.title: 1 किलो चिकन सुक्क आणि गावरान रस्सा परफेक्ट प्रमाणात रेसीपी। करा स्वतःचा बिझनेस, संपूर्ण माहिती
snippet.description:
1 किलो चिकन सुक्क आणि गावरान रस्सा परफेक्ट प्रमाणात रेसीपी। करा स्वतःचा बिझनेस, संपूर्ण माहिती

Ingredients / साहित्य -
Serves 6 
6 लोकांसाठी 

Chicken / चिकन 1 kilo 
Salt / मीठ 2 tsp. 
Turmeric / हळद 2 tsp
Oil / तेल 2 tbsp (30 ml) 
Chopped onion / चिरलेला कांदा 2 med (100gms)
Water / पाणी - 1 & 1/2 liter 

For masala / मसाला 

Black pepper / काळी मिरी 10-12
Cloves / लवंगा 10-12
Cinnamon / दालचीनी 1 inch
Cummin seeds / जिरे 2 tsp (10gms)
Corriander seeds / धणे 3 tsp (10gms)
Sesame / तिळ 2 tsp (10 gms) 
Dry coconut / सुके खोबरे 1/2 cup ( 80gms)
Sliced onion / कांदा - 4 big med (300gms) 
Garlic / लसुण 2 whole bunch (50gms)
Ginger /आले 2&1/2 inch (30gms) 
Green chillies / हिरव्या मिरच्या 3
Oil / तेल 3 tbsp (45ml)
Fresh coriander / कोथिंबीर handful (30gms)
Kashmiri red chilly pw / काश्मिरी मिरची पावडर - 3 tsp (15gms)
Kanda lasun masala / कांदा लसुण मसाला 4 tsp (20gms)

Making chicken & curry / चिकन आणि रस्सा साठी - 
Oil / तेल 5 tbsp (75 gms) 
Garam masala pw / गरम मसाला पावडर 1 tsp (5gms)
Corriander pw / धणे पूड 2 tsp (10 gms) 
Fresh corriander / कोथिंबीर 

#1किलोचिकनसुक्कआणिरस्सा
#1किलोसुक्कचिकनआणिरस्सा
#1kilosukhachickenaanirassa
#homemadechickenrassa
#1kilogavaranchickenrassa
#drychickenrecipe 
#chickencurry
#spicychickencurry
#झणझणीतगावरानसूखचिकनआणिरस्सा 
#सुक्कचिकन 
#gavranchicken
#गावरानचिकन
#homemadefoodbusiness
#chicken #nonveg #sundayspecial
tags: 1 किलो चिकन सुक्क आणि गावरान रस्सा
1 किलो प्रमाणात ऑर्डर साठी सुक्क चिकन आणि रस्सा
खाल्ल्यानंतर चव विसरणार नाही अस्सा गावरान झणझणीत गावरान चिकन रस्सा आणि सुख चिकन

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता का उल्टा चशमाह - Episode 817 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in Gokuldham Co-operative Society and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

snippet.title: Sonu और Tappu को साथ देख Bhide को हुई Tension - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Sonu Ka Surprise
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Watch the full episodes of Sonu Ka Surprise: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7apv3AH-pijBqwwyS_x53aV

We bring to you the specially picked up episodes of "Sonu Ka Surprise". What does this series depict? Sonu who has been out due to something important is not seen in the Gokuldham for quite a long now. How does Tapu Sena manage to fulfill her absence? Watch to find out now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: 
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Gents Ne Toda Vrat?! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | TMKOC Comedy | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya

Operation Head: Sohil Ramani

snippet.title: Kanyadaan - Full Episode | 21 May 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Kanyadaan" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

INGREDIENTS USED,

1 Cup= 200gm/200ml
Total Quantity= 10 to 15 Laddoos

Cardamom Powder- a Pinch (Optional)
Water- as required

yeh karte hai jo
Na bilkul vaise yeh jooth may pro
Chehra pe chehra sajake yeh rakhe han 
Raavan ke dus thay aur inke hain saw
Maa baap ke na choote charan
Yahan rozz hotta seeta haran(rape)
Vo laakhon cheekhein lagati hai 
Par desh sotta jaise kumbhkaran. 

RAMAYANA RAMAYANA 
KALYUG KA HAI YEH AINA
RAMAYANA RAMAYANA 
KALYUG KA HAI YEH AINA

Baahar se hard andar se soft
Kya rakhein umeed murabbon se,
Jinhone payi hanuman si body
Protein ke daboon se

Har jgah maidaan jung ka
paise ke peechay banda hai andha 
Pooje mandir mein raam ko 
aur mann may saji hai raavan ki lanka

Bandi se meet kray 
Use karke de-lete kray 
saroopnakha si chorri kay liay 
seeta si biwi ko cheat kray

Chodd kar ke maa baap
Nikle ram seeta banwaas pe,
14 Chaw-da saal beetay kabke
vo bhule ghar jaate raste

RAMAYANA RAMAYANA 
KALYUG KA HAI YEH AINA

snippet.title: 1 കപ്പ് പച്ചരിയും കാൽകപ്പ് ഉഴുന്നും ഉണ്ടോ, രുചിയൂറും മസാല പനിയാരം തയ്യാറാക്കാം | Kuzhi Paniyaram
snippet.description:
#MasalaPaniyaramRecipe
#EasyKuzhiPaniyaram
#EasyBreakfast
#EasyEveningSnacks

Ingredients 
`````````````````
raw rice/white rice - 1 cup
urad dal -1/4 cup
Fenugreek seeds -1/4 tsp
water
oil -2 tbsp
garlic -1 tbsp
ginger -1 tsp
curry leaves -1-2 tsp
Onion -1
chilli powder -1 tsp
hing powder -1/4 tsp
Coriander leaves -2 tbsp
oil -2 -3 tbsp
`````````````````

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 237
snippet.description:
Ragini is persuaded by Laksh to sign a document and later on, she slips into anxiety. Swara reassures her with some strong words.

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bwL5H8eIQ6w51VWKyjzA0oU

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?
